summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Somatic wellness app pivot. Backend APIs 100% functional with Louise Hay-inspired language. Frontend React shell fully themed with Somatic colors. All wellness features working: onboarding, home, scan, results with AI insight generation, and reflect pages. No clinical UI elements accessible.
passed_tests: Backend: All 17 API tests passed (100% success rate)
POST /api/insight - Returns Louise Hay-inspired wellness text (no clinical language)
POST /api/insight - Caching works correctly (second call returns cached:true)
POST /api/snapshot - Accepts new Somatic payload shape with fused vitals
GET /api/snapshots/:id - Returns full snapshot with fused object for Results page
GET /api/affirmations/today - Returns daily affirmation, mirror prompt, journal prompt
POST /api/journal - Saves journal entries with text, prompt, snapshotId
POST /api/practice - Logs practice taps (affirmation, journal, breath, scan, reflection)
GET /api/streak - Returns current streak count and total practice days
POST /api/notify-me - Accepts feature interest signup (auscultation)
Frontend: OnboardingGate redirects to /onboarding when localStorage profile missing
Frontend: Onboarding flow - 3 slides with wellness messaging, name input, Get Started button
Frontend: Home page - 3D heart, time-aware greeting with name, affirmation card, snapshot strip (HRV/Nervous System/Streak)
Frontend: Scan page - Face/Finger toggle pills, auscultation locked modal with email signup
Frontend: Results page - BPM hero (68), vitals grid (HRV/SpO2/Resp), nervous system state card (color-coded)
Frontend: Results page - 'Get a deeper insight' button triggers /api/insight and renders AI text in 'A deeper reflection' card
Frontend: Reflect page - Affirmation with hold-to-absorb, mirror work, journal input, breathwork (box breathing)
Frontend: aisteth.html - Somatic theme with 'Listening to your heart' title, Face/Finger toggle, no clinical UI
Theme colors verified: Deep space black #0A0A0F, rose #E8445A, amber #F5C87A
No clinical features accessible through UI (no QRISK3, patient list, Calculate Risk button, profile sheet)
All reflection text uses compassionate, Louise Hay-inspired language (not clinical/diagnostic)

success_percentage.integration: 100% (AI insight generation, snapshot creation/retrieval, journal, practice logging all working)
